insight: ChatControl forwards game chat to Discord through its own pipeline (Discord.sendChannelMessage, the single choke point for channels, join/quit broadcasts, and rules), bypassing DiscordSRV's processChatMessage, so DiscordSRV's game-chat options don't automatically apply. Since the #3801 fix, in-game @Name mentions are converted to real Discord pings by honoring DiscordSRV's DiscordChatChannelTranslateMentions key in DiscordSRV's config.yml — there is no ChatControl-side key for this.

Discord mention translation (DiscordUtil.convertMentionsFromNames) matches @Name against Discord usernames/nicknames of guild members, not DiscordSRV linked accounts — so players must type the person's Discord name, not their Minecraft name, to trigger a ping. Users asking to "mention verified/linked players" commonly misunderstand this.
